howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Description: Choose any photo — a portrait, landscape, pet, or cityscape. We accept JPG, PNG, and WebP up to 10 MB.
howItWorks.step2Description: Select from watercolor, oil painting, charcoal sketch, and more. Each style is crafted by AI to deliver stunning results.
howItWorks.step3Description: Preview your transformed photo and order it as a high-quality print delivered straight to your door.

cta.heading: Ready to Create Something Beautiful?
cta.subtext: Transform your favorite photo into a one-of-a-kind piece of art in minutes.

testimonials.heading: Loved by Customers
testimonials.subtext: See what people are saying about their Aquacanvas experience.
testimonials.t1Text: I uploaded a photo of my dog and the watercolor result was absolutely stunning. It looks like a real painting hanging in our living room now!
testimonials.t2Text: As a photographer, I'm picky about image quality. Aquacanvas genuinely impressed me — the AI captures textures and lighting beautifully.
testimonials.t3Text: Turned our wedding photo into an oil painting-style print for my husband's birthday. He was speechless. Best gift idea ever.

landingFaq.heading: Common Questions
landingFaq.a1: The AI generates your artwork in about 10–30 seconds. Prints are shipped within 3–5 business days.
landingFaq.a2: We accept JPG, PNG, and WebP files up to 10 MB. Higher resolution photos produce the best results.
landingFaq.a3: Absolutely. You'll see a full preview of your artwork before committing to a purchase.
landingFaq.a4: Yes. Your photos are used only to generate your artwork and are never shared or used for training.

styleShowcase.heading: Transform Into Any Style
styleShowcase.subtext: From soft watercolors to bold oil paintings — choose the perfect style for your photo.

admin.testModeDescription: When enabled, the create page shows a completed generation result with test images from /public/images instead of requiring actual AI generation. Useful for testing the preview and lightbox experience.
admin.rateLimitBypassDescription: When enabled, rate limits for AI generation are bypassed. Authenticated users are normally limited to 5 generations per hour, guests to 3. Turn this on during development or testing.

about.title: About Aquacanvas
about.subtitle: We believe every photo holds a story worth framing.
about.missionText: Aquacanvas was born from a simple idea: everyone deserves access to beautiful, personalised art. By combining cutting-edge AI with curated art styles, we turn your everyday photos into gallery-worthy prints — no artistic skills required.
about.howText: Our AI models are fine-tuned on thousands of masterworks, learning the brushstrokes, textures, and palettes of each style. When you upload a photo, the AI doesn't just apply a filter — it reimagines your image as if it were painted by hand.
about.value1Text: Every print is produced on museum-grade paper with archival inks, ensuring your art looks stunning for decades.
about.value2Text: Beautiful art shouldn't be a luxury. Our AI makes custom artwork affordable for everyone.
about.value3Text: Your photos are yours. We never share, sell, or use your images for training without explicit consent.
about.ctaHeading: Ready to see what your photo looks like as art?

meta.title: About
meta.description: Learn how Aquacanvas uses AI to transform your photos into stunning art prints. Our mission, our process, and our values.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question, feedback, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind…
contact.successText: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.responseValue: We typically reply within 24 hours on business days.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Questions about your order, our art styles, or anything else? Get in touch with the Aquacanvas team.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Aquacanvas, our process, and your orders.
faq.a1: Aquacanvas is an AI-powered platform that transforms your photos into stunning art prints. Upload any photo, choose an art style like watercolor or oil painting, and we'll create a unique artwork you can order as a high-quality print.
faq.q2: How does the AI transformation work?
faq.a2: Our AI models have been trained on thousands of masterworks to understand the textures, palettes, and techniques of each art style. When you upload a photo, the AI reimagines it as if it were painted by hand — not just a filter, but a true artistic reinterpretation.
faq.q3: What photo formats do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept JPG, PNG, and WebP files up to 10 MB. For best results, use a high-resolution photo with good lighting.
faq.q4: How long does it take to receive my print?
faq.a4: The AI generates your artwork in about 10–30 seconds. Once you place your order, prints are typically produced and shipped within 3–5 business days.
faq.q5: What paper and print quality do you use?
faq.a5: We print on museum-grade, acid-free paper with archival pigment inks. The result is a vibrant, long-lasting print that looks and feels like a genuine work of art.
faq.a6: If you're not satisfied with your print, contact us within 14 days of delivery and we'll work with you to make it right — whether that's a reprint or a refund.
faq.a7: We currently offer watercolor as our flagship style, with oil painting, charcoal sketch, anime, and impressionism coming soon. Each style is carefully tuned to deliver authentic results.
faq.a8: Absolutely. After uploading your photo and selecting a style, you'll see a full preview of your artwork before committing to a purchase.
faq.a9: Your photos are used only to generate your artwork. We do not sell, share, or use your images for AI training without your explicit consent. You can request deletion of your data at any time.
faq.a10: Yes. All payments are processed through Stripe, a PCI-compliant payment processor. We never store your card details on our servers.
faq.ctaText: We're here to help. Reach out to our team and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How Aquacanvas collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
privacy.introP1: This Privacy Policy explains how [Company Name] ("Aquacanvas", "we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and protects personal data when you visit aquacanvas.com or place an order for a print. We are the data controller under the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.introP2: By using our service, you agree to the practices described in this policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
privacy.dataWeCollectIntro: We collect only the data we need to generate your artwork and fulfil your order:
privacy.dataBullet1: Photos you upload — stored temporarily in EU-based object storage solely to produce your artwork.
privacy.dataBullet2: Contact details — the email address you provide at checkout (required to send order confirmations and shipping updates).
privacy.dataBullet3: Shipping address — collected through Stripe Checkout and used only to deliver your print.
privacy.dataBullet4: Technical data — IP address, browser type, and basic session cookies required for the site to function and to prevent abuse.
privacy.legalBasisP1: We process your data under GDPR Article 6(1)(b) — performance of a contract (creating and shipping your order) — and Article 6(1)(f) — our legitimate interest in keeping the service secure and preventing fraud. We do not rely on consent for essential order processing because the data is required to deliver what you purchased.
privacy.retentionP1: Uploaded photos and generated artwork are retained for up to 12 months after your order so we can handle reprints, complaints, or refund requests. After that period they are deleted from our storage.
privacy.retentionP2: Order records (order ID, email, purchased item, amount, shipping address) are retained for 7 years to comply with Swedish accounting law (Bokföringslagen 1999:1078).
privacy.processorsIntro: We use the following sub-processors, each bound by a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) and EU- or adequacy-aligned data transfers:
privacy.processor1: Supabase (EU West, Ireland) — database, authentication, and object storage.
privacy.processor2: Vercel (EU region for compute) — application hosting and edge caching.
privacy.processor3: Stripe Payments Europe Ltd. (Ireland) — payment processing and checkout. Card details never reach our servers.
privacy.processor4: Kie.ai — AI image generation. Uploaded photos are sent only to produce your artwork and are not used to train public models.
privacy.processor5: Resend — transactional email delivery (order confirmations, shipping notifications, admin alerts).
privacy.rightsIntro: Under the GDPR you have the right to:
privacy.right1: Access the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.right3: Request erasure of your data ("right to be forgotten"), subject to the legal retention periods above.
privacy.right4: Request a copy of your data in a portable format.
privacy.right5: Object to or restrict certain processing activities.
privacy.right6: Lodge a complaint with the Swedish data protection authority (Integritetsskyddsmyndigheten, imy.se).
privacy.deletionP1: To exercise any of the rights above, email support@aquacanvas.com from the email address you used to place the order. Include the order ID (found in your confirmation email) and describe your request. We will respond within 30 days as required by GDPR Article 12(3).
privacy.deletionP2: We may need to retain certain information to meet legal obligations (e.g. accounting records). In that case we will explain what we can delete and what we must keep, and why.
privacy.securityP1: We protect your data with TLS encryption in transit, encryption at rest, row-level security on our database, and strict access controls. No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure, but we take all reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your information.
privacy.changesP1: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be announced on this page with a revised "last updated" date. Continued use of the service after an update constitutes acceptance of the new policy.
privacy.contactP1: Questions about this policy or how we handle your data? Email support@aquacanvas.com. Our postal address: [Company Name], [Street], [Postcode City], Sweden. Organisation number: [Org.nr].

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How Aquacanvas collects, uses, and protects your personal data in compliance with the GDPR.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The terms that govern your use of Aquacanvas and any order you place with us.
terms.acceptanceP1: These Terms of Service ("Terms") form a binding agreement between you and [Company Name] ("Aquacanvas", "we", "us") governing your use of aquacanvas.com and any order you place with us. By using the service or placing an order, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms.
terms.serviceP1: Aquacanvas is an AI-powered platform that transforms photos you upload into artwork and offers that artwork as a physical canvas print delivered to your address.
terms.serviceP2: You must be at least 18 years old, or have the consent of a legal guardian, to place an order. You are responsible for providing accurate information at checkout.
terms.ordersP1: An order is confirmed when you complete payment through our checkout. You will receive an order confirmation by email. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order that violates these Terms, appears fraudulent, or contains content we cannot lawfully produce.
terms.ordersP2: Each canvas print is produced on demand based on the specific photo and style you select. Prints are therefore considered personalised goods under Swedish consumer law.
terms.pricingP1: All prices are listed in Swedish kronor (SEK) and include 25% VAT. The final price, including any shipping fees, is shown in Stripe Checkout before you confirm payment.
terms.pricingP2: Payments are processed securely by Stripe. We never receive or store your full card details.
terms.deliveryP1: AI artwork is typically generated within 10–30 seconds of placing your order. Physical prints are produced and shipped within 3–5 business days. Estimated delivery times are communicated at checkout and in your confirmation email.
terms.deliveryP2: Risk of loss or damage passes to you when the carrier hands over the shipment. If your print arrives damaged, contact support@aquacanvas.com within 14 days with photos of the damage and we will make it right.
terms.withdrawalP1: Under the Swedish Distance Contracts Act (Lag (2005:59) om distansavtal och avtal utanför affärslokaler), consumers generally have a 14-day right of withdrawal from the day the goods are received.
terms.withdrawalP2: However, because each canvas print is produced on demand from a photo and style that you choose, our prints qualify as personalised goods made to the consumer's specifications. Under Chapter 2 Section 11 of the same Act, the right of withdrawal does not apply to such goods once production has begun.
terms.withdrawalP3: Production begins as soon as payment is confirmed. You therefore waive your right of withdrawal at the moment you complete checkout. This does not affect your statutory rights in case the product is defective — see Complaints below.
terms.complaintsP1: If your print is defective, damaged on arrival, or not what you ordered, contact support@aquacanvas.com within a reasonable time and no later than two months after discovering the defect. Under the Swedish Consumer Sales Act (Konsumentköplagen 2022:260) you have the right to a repair, reprint, price reduction, or refund depending on the circumstances.
terms.complaintsP2: If we cannot resolve a complaint, you may refer the matter to the Swedish National Board for Consumer Disputes (Allmänna reklamationsnämnden, arn.se) or use the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform (ec.europa.eu/odr).
terms.ipP1: You retain all rights to the photos you upload. By uploading a photo you grant Aquacanvas a limited, non-exclusive, royalty-free licence to process that photo solely for the purpose of generating and delivering your order, including printing, packaging, and fulfilment.
terms.ipP2: We do not claim ownership of your photos and we do not use them to train public AI models, publish them publicly, or resell them to third parties.
terms.ipP3: All other content on aquacanvas.com — including the site design, logos, marketing copy, example artwork, and source code — is owned by Aquacanvas or its licensors and may not be copied or reused without written permission.
terms.acceptableUseIntro: You agree not to upload any photo that:
terms.acceptableUse1: you do not have the legal right to use (e.g. stock photos, other people's artwork, or images subject to third-party copyright);
terms.acceptableUse2: depicts minors in an inappropriate or exploitative way, or any sexual content involving minors;
terms.acceptableUse3: contains sexually explicit material, graphic violence, hate speech, or content that incites violence or discrimination;
terms.acceptableUse4: identifies other people without their consent where their likeness is the primary subject of the artwork.
terms.liabilityP1: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, our total liability for any claim arising out of or relating to your use of the service or a specific order is limited to the amount you paid for the order in question.
terms.liabilityP2: Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits liability for intentional misconduct, gross negligence, personal injury, or other liability that cannot be excluded under mandatory Swedish consumer law.
terms.forceMajeureP1: We are not liable for delays or failures caused by events outside our reasonable control, including but not limited to natural disasters, war, strikes, supplier failures, carrier delays, power or internet outages, or government actions.
terms.changesP1: We may update these Terms from time to time. The version that applies to your order is the one published on aquacanvas.com at the time you place it.
terms.governingLawP1: These Terms are governed by Swedish law. Disputes shall be handled by the competent Swedish court, or — where applicable — by the Swedish National Board for Consumer Disputes. Mandatory consumer protections under the law of the country where you reside as a consumer are not affected.
terms.contactP1: Questions about these Terms? Email support@aquacanvas.com. [Company Name], [Street], [Postcode City], Sweden. Organisation number: [Org.nr].

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: The terms that govern your use of Aquacanvas, our prints, pricing, delivery, right of withdrawal, and complaints.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: How and why Aquacanvas uses cookies and similar technologies.
cookies.whatP1: Cookies are small text files that a website stores on your device. They let the site remember who you are between page loads, keep you signed in, and make features work correctly. Similar technologies include local storage and session storage, which we treat the same way.
cookies.whyNoBannerHeading: Why You Do Not See a Cookie Banner
cookies.whyNoBannerP1: Under the EU ePrivacy Directive and Swedish Electronic Communications Act (LEK 2003:389, Chapter 6 Section 18), consent is required for cookies that are not strictly necessary to deliver the service you requested.
cookies.whyNoBannerP2: Aquacanvas only uses strictly necessary and functional cookies. We do not run analytics, advertising, tracking, or fingerprinting. Because consent is not legally required for essential cookies, we do not show a banner. If we add analytics or marketing tools in the future, we will introduce a consent mechanism at that point.
cookies.cookiesWeSetIntro: The complete list of cookies we may set on your browser:
cookies.cookieSupabaseAccessPurpose: Holds your Supabase session so you stay signed in (admin only).
cookies.cookieSupabaseRefreshPurpose: Refreshes your Supabase session without forcing re-login (admin only).
cookies.cookieTestModePurpose: Shows pre-generated test images on the create page. Admin-only, set manually from the Settings screen.
cookies.cookieRateLimitPurpose: Bypasses generation rate limits during testing. Admin-only, set manually from the Settings screen.
cookies.thirdPartyP1: When you pay at checkout you are redirected to Stripe, which sets its own cookies to complete the transaction and prevent fraud. Those cookies are governed by Stripe's own policy at stripe.com/cookie-settings. No third-party cookies are set on aquacanvas.com itself.
cookies.manageP1: You can delete existing cookies and block new ones through your browser settings. Instructions are available at support pages for Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge.
cookies.manageP2: Blocking strictly necessary cookies may prevent parts of the service from working correctly — for example, the admin panel or saved theme preference.
cookies.changesP1: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. The "last updated" date at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision.
cookies.contactP1: Questions about cookies on aquacanvas.com? Email support@aquacanvas.com.

meta.title: Cookie Policy
meta.description: The cookies Aquacanvas uses, why no consent banner is shown, and how to manage cookies in your browser.
